title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for downloading, running, and managing LLMs locally; supports Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and many others.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for easy integration into Python apps.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node.js and browsers to talk with a local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration that adds Ollama models as LLM and chat components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for chatting with any Ollama model, inspired by ChatGPT.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library providing a fluent DSL for interacting with Ollama.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for integrating Ollama models into Rails or standalone Ruby apps.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Simple Python CLI tool that adds persistent chat history and markdown rendering on top of Ollama.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as a GitHub-Copilot-like assistant.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or chatters in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples for running Ollama server containerized with GPU support.

title: ollama-kotlin-sdk
summary: Community Kotlin multiplatform SDK for JVM/Android targeting Ollama REST endpoints.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# .NET client with async/await and streaming support for Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Python Slack Bolt bot that integrates Ollama models into Slack channels with threaded replies.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that adds a slash command to summarize blocks or generate text using Ollama.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Community Nim library for communicating with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Community Elixir client built with Mint HTTP for chatting with Ollama in Phoenix apps.
